### ✅ Checklist

Please make sure all items are checked before requesting a review:

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `develop`
- [ ] My code follows the [Dart style guide](https://dart.dev/guides/language/effective-dart/style)
- [ ] I have run `flutter analyze` and fixed all warnings/errors
- [ ] I have run `dart format .` to auto-format my code
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have tested this on **at least one** of: Chrome (web), Android emulator, or iOS simulator
- [ ] I have added or updated comments for any non-obvious logic
- [ ] I have not introduced any hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] I have linked the correct issue above

---

### 🧪 How to Test

<!-- Describe the steps a reviewer can take to test your changes -->
1. Checkout this branch: `git checkout <branch-name>`
2. Run `flutter pub get`
3. Run `flutter run -d chrome`
4. ...
